verdict: 2026-07-02 13:40:09 PDT — Shape sound. If I were satisfying these ACs, I would use the same primitives: Vite `define` for baked client metadata, a tiny guarded `buildInfo` module with normalized env kind, a hook-free badge mounted only in the side-panel `RoleBar`, the existing `logLifecycle('boot', ...)` path with raw env + full commit, and a sibling unauthenticated Express `/api/version` route. The implementation stays inside the scoped files, adds no dependency, uses framework-native configuration rather than hand-rolled build plumbing, and folds in the prior design-review guardrails about full-SHA logging and fixed CSS class vocabulary. No high-leverage approach concerns found.
